content.en:
Outside the Dark Souls.

A number of ancestors appeared, and these ancestors were not incarnations, but real bodies descended here.

Just because tens of thousands of years have passed, the Dark Soul Domain has been born for a hundred realm years.

At this time, the Dark Souls Domain no longer restricted the entry of the ancestors.

And at this time, the Dark Soul Domain will give birth to a second Ancestral Realm, and the Ancestral Realm will also give birth to more rare resources, and even give birth to resources that the Ancestors will have great use.

The ancestors didn't care about the resources before, those resources didn't help them much, but now it's different, what they are waiting for is today.

For the sake of these chances and the territory of the Dark Soul Domain, they will even fight each other.

At this time.

The Ancestor of Destruction exuded a strong aura of destruction, and the faintly revealed killing intent made many Ancestors tremble.

At this time, one ancestor after another was secretly communicating.

"I'm afraid that the Aoba Ancestor of the Human Race is going to be finished, just a hundred realm years, how far can he grow? At the beginning, the Dark Soul Domain was able to survive the crisis, and it was the Destruction Ancestor at that time who was the elite ancestor, but now the Destruction Ancestor is the top ancestor combat power, and the Aoba Ancestor has not been able to fully use the power of the Dark Soul Domain, at most he can exert the combat power of the ordinary elite ancestor. Once the Ancestor of Destruction attacks the Ancestor of Aoba, the Ancestor of Aoba is afraid that he will not survive!"

"Who let the Aoba Ancestor dare to kill a Destruction Saint Clan's unsuperior domain ancestor who is about to be promoted to the Ancestor, naturally angering the Destruction Ancestor and the Space-Time Ancestor!"

"A peerless domain ancestor who is about to be promoted to the Ancestor of the Holy Gate of All Things also died at the hands of the Aoba Ancestor, and the Ancestor of All Things is afraid that he will also attack the Aoba Ancestor."

"The Ancestor of All Things is just an ordinary Ancestor, and it is estimated that he is not the opponent of the Aoba Ancestor, but he will definitely attack the Terran where the Aoba Ancestor is located, such as the Terran Wanfa War Ancestor, there is definitely hope of being promoted to the Ancestor, and the combat power is very terrifying, maybe the Ancestor of All Things will retaliate and kill the Wanfa War Ancestor?"

"It's not realistic for the Ancestor of All Things to want to kill the Ten Thousand Laws War Ancestor, the War Ancestor and the Realm Ancestor will not let it go, they will definitely stop it!"

"It may not be able to stop it, once you enter the Dark Soul Domain, many ancestors will fight each other, then a chaotic situation, anything can happen!"

......

Time passed slowly, and the day when the Ancestors entered the Dark Soul Realm was getting closer and closer.

In the past, billions of years were just a nap time for these ancestors, but now it seems to be an incomparably long time.

this day.

Abrupt.

The Dark Soul Domain shook, and someone was impacting the Ancestor Realm, and the movement was incomparably huge, many times bigger than the Aoba Ancestor breaking through the Ancestor.

"Who, who's attacking the Ancestors?"

One Ancestor after another was shocked.

At this critical juncture, it was strange that someone suddenly attacked the Ancestor Realm in the Dark Soul Domain.

"It's the Ten Thousand Laws War Ancestor of the Human Race, there's no need to guess, the Dark Soul Domain is now qualified to impact the Ancestor, and the person who can make such a terrifying movement is none other than him!"

One of the Ancestors spoke.

"There are still thousands of years, we can enter the Dark Soul Realm, the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor broke through the realm at this time, I'm afraid that there is no way to completely enter the Ancestor Realm, isn't he afraid that the breakthrough process will be interrupted?"

Indeed, without a superior domain ancestor to impact the Ancestor Realm, it is impossible to completely break through to the Ancestor Realm without millions of years.

Moreover, the ordinary Time Array couldn't resist the breath of the Ancestor at all, and there was no way to break through inside the Time Array.

Thousands of years are simply not enough.

However, they ignore the existence of the Aoba Ancestor.

Bang!!!!

The Aoba Ancestor mobilized the power of the Dark Soul Domain and began to speed up time in the area of Ye Tian's retreat.

100 times!

1000 times!

10,000 times!

It took 10,000 times to speed up Ye Tian, who was impacting the ancestor, and frantically mobilized the energy of the Dark Soul Domain to assist Ye Tian in breaking through, which paid a great price.

At this moment, the energy of the Qingye Ancestor was constantly consumed, and in order to restore the energy, a large number of Silent Treasures were consumed and refined by Ye Tian.

Outside the Dark Souls.

The ancestors were stunned, and they also sensed the actions of the Aoba ancestor.

"He actually accelerated the time of the Dark Soul Domain and assisted the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain to break through, wouldn't he be afraid that after thousands of years, his state would be unstable?" said one of the Ancestors.

When many Ancestors were surprised, the Ancestor of Destruction opened his eyes and looked at the Dark Soul Domain.

"Hmph, the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor, no matter how demonic the talent is, no matter how deep the foundation is, it is a big deal to break through the combat power comparable to the elite ancestor, but the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor is not the first person to break through to the Dark Soul Domain, and there is no way to use the power of the Dark Soul Domain, so the combat power is only the combat power of the ordinary elite ancestor, so there is no need to be afraid!"

Destroy the Ancestral Secret Path.

However, he underestimated Ye Tian.

Ye Tian not only has an incomparably deep foundation, but has completed the second transformation at the level of the Superior Domain Ancestor, and has mastered several Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, and his combat power is not as they imagined, only the combat power of ordinary elite ancestors.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years had passed in the outside world, and under the acceleration of time, Ye Tian had broken through millions of years.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian completely completed the breakthrough, condensed the Endless Ancestor Body, and stepped into the Ancestor Realm.

As soon as he broke through to the Ancestor Realm, Ye Tian's strength did not know how many times he had increased, and the Endless Ancestor Body far surpassed other Ancestor Bodies, which could be called truly immortal and immortal.

Although he didn't have time to refine that large number of Silent Destruction Treasures now, he couldn't quickly improve his cultivation.

But after all, he has the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and once he breaks through the Ancestral Realm, he can fully exert the power of the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and his combat power is stronger than that of the Aoba Ancestor with the help of the Dark Soul Domain.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, his current strength is infinitely close to the top ancestor combat power.

And with the Endless Ancestor Body, the top Ancestor couldn't kill him.

If he was given enough time, he could easily step into the top Ancestor Combat Power.

At this time, there were still thousands of years left in the outside world, and Ye Tian asked the clone Qingye Ancestor to continue to accelerate the time in this area, and he began to frantically refine those silent treasures, striving to improve his cultivation a little more.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Countless Silent Annihilation Treasures were devoured and refined by Ye Tian, and their cultivation improved little by little.

It's a pity that no matter how much he cultivates, he can only cultivate for tens of millions of years more, and he can't improve his strength too much, it's not bad to increase his strength by thirty percent, he can only get closer to the top ancestor combat power.

However, this is enough!

When there was still a hundred years left, Ye Tian manipulated the clone Aoba Ancestor to stop the time acceleration and instead refine a large number of Silent Treasures to restore his state.

Moreover, Ye Tian destroyed the Silent Time and Space, at least he couldn't let the other Ancestors know, and waited for the future to slowly cultivate the Silent Time and Space.

Soon, a hundred years passed.

The Ancestors are about to descend on the Dark Souls.
